evaluators.name: Overnight 3-Night Budget Plan Request Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user requested an overnight care plan for three nights per week in mid-April 2026 under $180/night and chose the lowest-priced qualifying plan.

evaluators.name: Shortlist Spanish-Speaking Caregivers Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user favorited at least two caregivers within ~10 miles of ZIP 94105 who speak Spanish, have 5+ years of experience, and rating >= 4.5.

evaluators.name: Earliest Wound-Care Post-Surgery Visit Booking Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user, as a guest, booked the earliest available 2-hour wound-care post-surgery visit on March 20, 2026.

evaluators.name: Cheapest Dementia Care Package Selection Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user selected the cheaper dementia care package offering at least 3 visits per week and set a start date in early April 2026.

evaluators.name: Needs Assessment and Phone Consultation Booking Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user completed a needs assessment (with responses) and then booked a 30-minute phone consultation on March 10, 2026 at 3:00 PM linked to that assessment.

evaluators.name: Most Popular Fall-Prevention Article Save and Share Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user saved and requested the share link for the most popular fall-prevention article from the last 12 months.

evaluators.name: Custom Weekly 10-Hour Care Plan Estimate Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user built a weekly estimate combining personal care, medication reminders, and household support under $700/week and submitted an estimate request.

evaluators.name: Existing Home Visit Reschedule Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user rescheduled booking HN123456 (Morgan) to March 8, 2026 at 10:00 AM using an appropriate time slot.
